name: Bolt Electricity, Oil & Gas
message: Bolt Energy specializes in providing energy solutions aimed at reducing costs by at least 25% for high voltage companies, and offering clean and affordable energy for residential and small business customers. They also deliver customized energy solutions for power plants. Established in 2010, Bolt Energy operates in both the free and captive markets, helping clients achieve significant energy savings. The company is actively engaged in energy generation and commercialization, focusing on efficient energy solutions
